message:
🌱 contour: Redirect: adding a redirect (301 or 302) option in ingressroute / httpproxy (#1244)

* 🌱 Add contour: Redirect: adding a redirect (301 or 302) option in mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct contour namespace to projectcontour

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "contour-1627-redirect-adding-a-redirect-301-or-302-option-in-ingressroute-httppr",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "contour: Redirect: adding a redirect (301 or 302) option in ingressroute / httpproxy",
+    "description": "Redirect: adding a redirect (301 or 302) option in ingressroute / httpproxy. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current contour deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your contour version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nhelm list -n projectcontour 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working contour installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review contour configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant contour configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get configmap -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=contour\n```\nThe ingressroute / httpproxy should be able to support a match and then redirect with either a 301 or 302 to an http or https destination\n\nSomething like:\n```\nspec:\n  routes:\n  - match: /\n    services:\n    - name: awesome-service-01\n      port:"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Redirect: adding a redirect (301 or 302) option in…",
+        "description": "add a HTTPRequestRedirectPolicy to the HTTPProxy spec which allows for HTTPProxy.Routes to specify a requestRedirectPolicy. This policy will allow a redirect to be configured for a specific set of Conditions within a single route.\n```yaml\nspec:\n  routes:\n  - match: /\n    services:\n    - name: awesome-service-01\n      port: 1000\n   - match: /redirectpath\n    redirect:\n      method: 301\n      destination: https://externalawesomewebsite.com\n  virtualhost:\n    fqdn: awesomehost.tld\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get events -n projectcontour --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Redirect: adding a redirect (301 or 302) option in…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "add a HTTPRequestRedirectPolicy to the HTTPProxy spec which allows for HTTPProxy.Routes to specify a requestRedirectPolicy. This policy will allow a redirect to be configured for a specific set of Conditions within a single route.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "spec:\n  routes:\n  - match: /\n    services:\n    - name: awesome-service-01\n      port: 1000\n   - match: /redirectpath\n    redirect:\n      method: 301\n      destination: https://externalawesomewebsite.com\n  virtualhost:\n    fqdn: awesomehost.tld",
+        "spec:\n  virtualhost: foo.example.com\n  routes:\n    - redirect:\n        destination: bar.example.com  # required\n        include_query_string: false      # default"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
